# The Token Guy

> Field notes from an IAM and Cloud Security Practitioner. Lab work,
> certification study, and the occasional rabbit hole covering Microsoft
> Entra, Zero Trust, PowerShell & Graph, and AI & Identity.

## Content

- [Microsoft Entra](https://thetokenguy.net/posts/): Identity governance,
  Conditional Access, PIM, authentication methods, hybrid identity
- [Zero Trust](https://thetokenguy.net/posts/): Architecture, policy design,
  network segmentation, identity-centric security
- [PowerShell & Graph](https://thetokenguy.net/posts/): Microsoft Graph API,
  automation scripts, audit queries, reporting
- [AI & Identity](https://thetokenguy.net/posts/): Non-human identity,
  workload federation, AI agent access patterns
- [Microsoft 365](https://thetokenguy.net/posts/): Exchange, Teams,
  SharePoint security and compliance
- [Microsoft Defender](https://thetokenguy.net/posts/): XDR, Sentinel,
  threat detection and response

## About

Author: Pankaj Parmar
Site: https://thetokenguy.net
Contact: pankaj@thetokenguy.net
